zh.lifeSummary: 當Alilitha de Harcourt於1336年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾藍頓時，她的父親William de Harcourt36歲，母親Jane Grey34歲。她和Adam de Burgh至少有1個女兒。她去世於1424年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾格諾薩爾享年88歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alilitha de Harcourt于1336年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾藍頓时，她的父亲William de Harcourt36岁，母亲Jane Grey34岁。她和Adam de Burgh至少有1个女儿。她去世于1424年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾格諾薩爾享年88岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Harcourt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

en.lifeSummary: When Alilitha de Harcourt was born in 1336, in Ranton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Harcourt, was 36 and her mother, Jane Grey, was 34. She had at least 1 daughter with Adam de Burgh. She died in 1424, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 88, and was buried in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alilitha de Harcourt est née en 1336, à Ranton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Harcourt, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Jane Grey, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Adam de Burgh. Elle est décédée en 1424, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alilitha de Harcourt 1336 in Ranton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Harcourt 36 und ihre Mutter Jane Grey 34. Sie hatte mit Adam de Burgh mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1424 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alilitha de Harcourt è nata il nel 1336 nel Ranton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Harcourt, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Jane Grey, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Adam de Burgh. Morì nel 1424, nel Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolta a Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alilitha de Harcourtが1336年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアラントンで生まれた時，父William de Harcourtは36歳，母Jane Greyは34歳であった。彼女はAdam de Burghとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1424年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルで88歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alilitha de Harcourt(이)가 1336년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 랜턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Harcourt(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Grey(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Adam de Burgh(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alilitha de Harcourt nasceu em 1336, em Ranton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Harcourt, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Jane Grey, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Adam de Burgh. Ela faleceu em 1424, em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 88 anos, e foi sepultada em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alilitha de Harcourt родилась в 1336 г. в местности рантон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Harcourt было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Grey, 34. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Adam de Burgh. Она умерла в 1424 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alilitha de Harcourt nació en 1336, en Ranton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Harcourt, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Jane Grey, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Adam de Burgh. Murió en 1424, en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultada en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
